title: aotus carinata
intro: Aotus carinata, also known as the 'Hairy Aotus', is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aotus carinata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations, making it a valuable remedy in traditional medicine. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
